DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF EVANS NATIONAL LEASING, INC.'S MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST DEFENDANT DR. KENDRA TOMCIK AND MARK HOOSHMAD FOR FAILURE TO ATTEND DEPOSITION AND FOR ORDER TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT FUTURE DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION WITHIN TWO WEEKS AND PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00. THEIR REMEDY IF ANY WHERE APPROPRIATE WAS TO SEEK A PROTECTIVE ORDER, NOT TO DECIDE UNILATERALLY TO FAIL TO APPEAR. CLARIFICATION: SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EVANS NATIONAL LEASING, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR ALTERNATIVELY SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING BUT ONLY AS IT CONCERNS CAUSES OF ACTION 1 (BREACH OF CONTRACT) AND 2 (COMMON COUNTS) AND NOT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 (BREACH OF GUARANTY), AS IT WAS NOT SET FORTH IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION OR SEPARATE STATEMENT. REMAINDER OF CAUSES OF ACTION TO BE DISMISSED BY PLAINTIFF. COURT OVERRULED ALL OBJECTIONS BROUGHT BY BOTH SIDES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS AN ASSIGNEE OF ILS AND THE LEASE CONTAINS AN ENFORCEABLE WAIVER OF DEFENSES AGAINST AN ASSIGNEE CLAUSE. (CAL COM CODE SECTION 9403.) DEFENDANT FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. THE LEASE IS A STATUTORY FINANCE LEASE AS DEFINED BY THE CALIFORNIA UNIFORM COMMERCIAL CODE AND IS IRREVOCABLE AND INDEPENDENT UPON LESSEE'S ACCEPTANCE OF THE GOODS. (CAL COM CODE SECTION 10407.) DEFENDANT ACCEPTED THE EQUIPMENT, AND ACKNOWLEDGED ITS SATISFACTORY CONDITION AND LACK OF WARRANTIES (LEASE PARAGRAPH 3, CAL COM CODE SECTIONS 10407, 10515, 10516.) SHE MADE PAYMENTS ON THE CONTRACT AND DEFAULTED MONTHS AFTER EXECUTION. EVEN IF PLAINTIFF WAS MISLED ABOUT WHAT THE CONTRACT IN FACT COVERED, THERE WAS NO FRAUD IN THE EXECUTION BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAD A REASONABLE OPPORTUNITY TO LEARN THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT, SHE NOTICED THE ABSENCE OF SOME TERMS, AND WAS AWARE OF THE ACTUAL CHARACTER OF WHAT SHE WAS SIGNING. AS A FINANCE LENDER, AN INTEREST RATE OF GREATER THAN 10% IS ALLOWABLE. (FINANCE CODE SECTION 22002.) THE REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. PLTF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
